title: oxystophyllum paniferum
intro: Oxystophyllum paniferum, also known as the Malayan orchid or Borneo tree orchid, is a type of flowering plant species that belongs to the orchid family. The medicinal properties of Oxystophyllum paniferum include its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin infections. This plant is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Oxystophyllum paniferum is typically used in herbal preparations such as extracts, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
